column1: # Static Q&A regression cases for the live LLM layer.
# The task tells the agent to visit a local fixture page and answer a
# closed-form question; the expected substring must appear (case-insensitive)
# in the agent's final answer on stdout. Keep answers unambiguous so LLM
# phrasing does not matter — match on the load-bearing token only.
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
Go to http://127.0.0.1:8081/facts/company.html and tell me only the year Acme Robotics was founded.
Go to http://127.0.0.1:8081/facts/company.html and tell me the city where Acme Robotics is headquartered.
Go to http://127.0.0.1:8081/facts/company.html and tell me the full name of the CEO of Acme Robotics.
Go to http://127.0.0.1:8081/facts/company.html and tell me the name of Acme Robotics' flagship product.
